evidence_posture.live_http_probes: NOT_AUDITABLE this session (agent egress policy 403 to *.vergeo5.com)
evidence_posture.supabase_live_sql: NOT_AUDITABLE this session (Supabase MCP unauthenticated + mcp.supabase.com egress 403); DB facts cite foundation baseline 2026-07-18
evidence_posture.n8n_live: VERIFIED this session (Vergeo5_N8N MCP reachable; 2 active workflows)
evidence_posture.repository: VERIFIED this session (local repo HEAD 0b88723, PR #277)

facts.fact: Product is 'Convergeo — Zambia's Premier Multivendor E-Commerce Platform'.
facts.production_evidence: CLAUDE.md + live customer app describe Vergeo5 multi-vendor commerce for Zambia (foundation).
facts.gap: Name mismatch: repo/prod brand is 'Vergeo5' (vergeo5.com); document says 'Convergeo'. GitHub org is kalumuso/convergeo.
facts.impact: Branding/identity ambiguity between Convergeo and Vergeo5.

facts.fact: Project start date April 21, 2026; duration 60 working days (8 weeks).
facts.production_evidence: Audit date 2026-07-18 is ~88 days after stated start; the 60-working-day window has elapsed. Platform is live but in demo state (foundation).
facts.gap: Doc-internal inconsistency (60 working days ≈ 12 weeks, not 8). Plan window elapsed; production not at plan's Day-60 end-state.
facts.impact: Schedule expectation vs reality gap.

facts.fact: Backend stack is Django 5.x + DRF (Django REST Framework).
facts.production_evidence: Repo services/api is FastAPI (pyproject name 'vergeo5-api', fastapi>=0.115.0, 181 files import fastapi); 0 Django references. CLAUDE.md D18 locks FastAPI.
facts.gap: Document mandates Django/DRF; production is FastAPI. Superseded by locked decision D18.
facts.impact: Any reader treating the roadmap as architecture source is misled; endpoint shapes, auth, ORM all differ.

facts.fact: Hosting is Vercel (frontends) + Railway (backend).
facts.production_evidence: Frontends on Vercel (VERIFIED foundation). Backend API on OCI/Hetzner behind system Caddy (Docker Compose), image ghcr.io/kalumuso/convergeo-api; no Railway. Supabase cloud for DB/Auth/Storage; Cloudflare front.
facts.gap: Backend hosting is not Railway; DB/Auth is Supabase (not in doc). Superseded by D19–D24.
facts.impact: Deploy/runbook/monitoring assumptions wrong if taken from roadmap.

facts.fact: Payment provider is DPO Pay (token creation, redirect, callback; Visa/Mastercard); 'DPO Pay production credentials activated' at launch.
facts.production_evidence: Repo has 0 DPO references, 70 Lenco references; payments/lenco/* adapters, webhooks_lenco router. CLAUDE.md D21 locks Lenco (MoMo USSD-push + hosted card widget).
facts.gap: Document names DPO Pay throughout; production uses Lenco exclusively. Payment-provider divergence.
facts.impact: PAYMENT discrepancy — P0 until investigated. Card PCI model differs (Lenco hosted widget, no direct card API).

facts.source_ref: p1 Day1 / p3 Day8-9 / p9 Day48
facts.fact: Search is Meilisearch (meilisearch-python SDK) with typo tolerance, facets, autocomplete; sync on product CRUD.
facts.production_evidence: Repo has 0 Meilisearch references; migrations use Postgres FTS + pg_trgm + pgvector (RRF fusion). CLAUDE.md D-stack: 'Postgres FTS + pg_trgm + pgvector, RRF fusion'. search_documents/embedding_jobs tables (foundation).
facts.gap: Document mandates Meilisearch; production uses Postgres-native search + vector. Superseded.
facts.impact: Search infra, sync triggers, and perf characteristics differ from plan.

facts.source_ref: p1 Day1 / p3 Day16 / p9 Day48
facts.fact: Redis is used for cart persistence and as a caching layer (Redis/Upstash).
facts.production_evidence: Repo services/api has 0 redis references. No Redis in foundation architecture inventory. Cart logic in services/api/app/services/orders + Postgres carts/cart_items tables (foundation: 3 carts/2 items).
facts.gap: No Redis layer in production; cart state persisted in Postgres. Superseded.
facts.impact: Caching/perf strategy differs; Phase-4 cache-hit KPI not applicable as written.

facts.fact: Async processing uses Celery + Redis with dead-letter queue.
facts.production_evidence: Repo has 0 Celery references. Async/scheduled work is done by n8n workflows + API /internal/* ticks + notification_outbox pattern (foundation, CLAUDE.md).
facts.gap: No Celery/Redis worker tier; n8n + outbox replace it. Superseded.
facts.impact: Task orchestration, retries, and monitoring differ from plan.

facts.fact: Email provider is SendGrid/Mailgun.
facts.production_evidence: Repo has 0 SendGrid/Mailgun references, 6 Resend references. CLAUDE.md: email fallback = Resend.
facts.gap: Email provider is Resend, not SendGrid/Mailgun. Superseded.
facts.impact: Email deliverability config/keys differ from plan.

facts.fact: Monorepo layout is backend/ customer-app/ vendor-app/ admin-app/ shared/.
facts.production_evidence: Production layout: apps/customer, apps/vendor, apps/admin, services/api, packages/{ui,types,config,i18n,auth,analytics} (pnpm+turborepo). (architecture-inventory)
facts.gap: Directory naming/structure differs (apps/* + services/api + packages/* vs *-app/ + backend/ + shared/).
facts.impact: Path references in plan do not resolve in repo.

facts.source_ref: p1 Day1 / p2 / p5 / p9 / p13
facts.fact: Project context file is AI_CONTEXT.md, updated each phase.
facts.production_evidence: AI_CONTEXT.md does not exist; production uses CLAUDE.md + docs/plan/*. (local ls)
facts.gap: Convention replaced by CLAUDE.md.
facts.impact: Low; naming only.

facts.fact: Contract-first: comprehensive OpenAPI v3.1 spec covering all endpoints; TS types auto-generated from spec; contract validation (schemathesis/dredd).
facts.production_evidence: API serves /openapi.json (title 'Vergeo5 API', v0.1.0) per foundation; packages/types has generated Supabase types (db.ts). Types generated from Supabase schema, not from OpenAPI as doc specifies.
facts.gap: OpenAPI exists but TS types derive from Supabase schema (gen-types.sh), not OpenAPI codegen; contract-test tooling not confirmed live.
facts.impact: Contract-first discipline partially realized differently.

facts.fact: Database is PostgreSQL 16.
facts.production_evidence: Supabase project dpadrlxukcjbewpqympu on Postgres 17.x channel (foundation production-evidence).
facts.gap: Live engine is Postgres 17.x, not 16.
facts.impact: Minor; both supported. Note for parity.

facts.fact: Auth: custom User (phone as primary id), phone OTP + email/password, JWT via djangorestframework-simplejwt (access+refresh).
facts.production_evidence: Production uses Supabase Auth (phone OTP / email / Google); JWT verified in core/auth.py; SMS OTP via edge function + Africa's Talking. No simplejwt. (architecture + access inventory)
facts.gap: Auth is Supabase-managed, not DRF-simplejwt; adds Google SSO not in doc. Functional intent (phone OTP + email) matches.
facts.impact: Token lifecycle/role-claim mechanics differ (see role-hook 0051 gap).

facts.fact: Rate limiting active on OTP endpoint.
facts.production_evidence: rate_counters table (RLS on, 0 client policies, service-role) present; auth rate limiting pattern (access inventory). Not runtime-exercised.
facts.gap: Mechanism present in schema/code; live enforcement not probed this session.
facts.impact: OTP abuse protection unproven at runtime.

facts.fact: Vendor model with business details, verification status, commission rate; multi-step onboarding; KYC upload (NRC, business registration); status machine Applied→Under Review→Approved/Rejected; owner-only permissions.
facts.production_evidence: vendors table (3 active demo vendors, slug/status/archetype); kyc_records table (0 rows); commission_rates (9 rows bps). RLS owner-scope. (schema inventory)
facts.gap: Schema present; KYC lifecycle unused (0 kyc_records, demo vendors auto-active); status-machine values not verified against doc's exact labels; live end-to-end not proven.
facts.impact: Vendor trust/KYC path unproven with real vendors.

facts.fact: Hierarchical category model (MPTT/django-treebeard) unlimited nesting with slug auto-gen.
facts.production_evidence: categories table (74 rows) with tree/slug (schema inventory). Not django-treebeard (FastAPI/Postgres).
facts.gap: Hierarchical categories exist; implementation is Postgres-native, not MPTT/treebeard.
facts.impact: Functional match; implementation differs.

facts.fact: Product model: SKU, ZMW pricing, stock tracking, vendor FK; vendor-scoped CRUD (Vendor A cannot edit Vendor B); variants with individual pricing/stock; up to 8 images drag-reorder via Cloudinary; approval Draft→Pending Review→Published/Rejected.
facts.production_evidence: products (150), vendor_listings (134, price_ngwee/status), listing_images (134, cloudinary_public_id, position; all 'demo/' prefix). RLS vendor-owner write. Money is integer ngwee (not decimal ZMW). (schema inventory + risk register R5)
facts.gap: Schema+RLS present and functionally aligned; but catalogue is 100% demo/seed (134 demo images); '≤8 images/listing' matches CLAUDE.md; approval-state labels not verified against doc; pricing stored as ngwee integers.
facts.impact: Vendor isolation & catalogue exist but presented data is demo (R5).

facts.fact: Search response time under 50ms for 10k products; cursor-based pagination; facets by category/price/vendor/rating/availability.
facts.production_evidence: Catalog API live (total 134) per foundation; no 10k-scale dataset exists; perf budget not measured this session; search is FTS/pgvector not Meilisearch.
facts.gap: Perf claim untestable at demo scale; engine differs (F006).
facts.impact: Search latency SLO unverified.

facts.fact: Next.js 14+ customer app (App Router, TS, Tailwind) with homepage, listing, detail, category pages; mobile-first 320/768/1024.
facts.production_evidence: apps/customer live on Vercel (www.vergeo5.com, /en/health 200); Next.js 15 App Router + TS + Tailwind 4 + next-intl + PWA (CLAUDE.md, foundation). Version is 15+, exceeds doc's '14+'.
facts.gap: Functional match (Next 15 ≥ 14); adds i18n/PWA beyond doc.
facts.impact: Customer storefront delivered.

facts.fact: Next.js 14+ vendor app with auth, dashboard, product/inventory management, image upload, variant mgmt, profile settings.
facts.production_evidence: apps/vendor live (vendor.vergeo5.com, login-gated 307→login) per foundation; Next 15.
facts.gap: App is live and auth-gated; internal dashboards not audited behind login this session; seller CTA from customer site is broken (R1, NEXT_PUBLIC_VENDOR_APP_URL unset).
facts.impact: Vendor portal exists but acquisition funnel from customer app broken (R1).

facts.fact: Quality gates: 90%+ backend test coverage, zero API contract violations, per-phase sign-off; Playwright E2E for customer/vendor/admin; staging deploy each phase.
facts.production_evidence: Repo has ci.yml/e2e.yml/perf.yml + e2e/ Playwright; but several CI gates non-blocking (secret-scan continue-on-error, Lighthouse advisory, e2e nightly not per-PR); deploy-staging.yml is a stub; branch protection NOT_AUDITABLE (R7).
facts.gap: Testing infrastructure exists but quality gates are not all blocking; coverage %/contract-violation counts not measured this session; staging pipeline is a stub.
facts.impact: Defects can merge despite advisory checks (R7).

facts.fact: Cart: user + anonymous/session carts, CartItem with variant/qty/computed price, add/remove/update/clear, vendor-grouped subtotal, stock validation, anon→user merge.
facts.production_evidence: carts (3) + cart_items (2) tables with user/guest, listing_id, status, price snapshot ngwee; cart_items unique (cart_id, listing_id) (schema inventory).
facts.gap: Schema present + minimal demo rows; merge/stock-validation logic not runtime-verified; Redis persistence replaced by Postgres (F007).
facts.impact: Cart exists; edge-case behavior unproven.

facts.fact: Address model (street, city, province, landmark, GPS); pickup point model; delivery zones (Lusaka zones + inter-city) with fee calc by zone+vendor; geocoding.
facts.production_evidence: addresses (0 rows), delivery_zones (3, fee ngwee), order pickup tokens (migration 0017) present (schema inventory). CLAUDE.md: landmark+GPS addressing, Lusaka delivery, nationwide pickup.
facts.gap: Address/zone/pickup schema present and aligned with ZM guardrails; addresses 0 rows; geocoding integration not verified.
facts.impact: Delivery model present; unexercised.

facts.fact: Escrow system holds funds until delivery confirmed; delivery confirmation triggers escrow release.
facts.production_evidence: Ledger tables (ledger_accounts/transactions/postings) exist but 0 txns; payments 0 rows; prepaid success path updates payments status only, no post_transaction/ESCROW_HOLD (R2); n8n escrow auto-release workflow (release-job.json) NOT live — only 2 workflows active (VERIFIED this session).
facts.gap: Escrow LEDGER POSTING on prepaid success is missing in code (R2) and escrow auto-release workflow is not deployed (R3). Core money-trust path unproven/broken.
facts.impact: Funds-held/released accounting wrong or absent after real payment — money integrity blocker.

facts.fact: Mobile money integration for MTN MoMo, Airtel Money, and Zamtel Kwacha.
facts.production_evidence: MTN/Airtel push supported via Lenco; Zamtel is payout-only pending founder action F9a; feature flag zamtel_collections=false; LENCO_ENABLE_ZAMTEL env (CLAUDE.md, foundation, repo 16 zamtel refs).
facts.gap: Zamtel Kwacha COLLECTIONS not enabled (flag off, payout-only); doc lists it as a launch collection method. MTN/Airtel align.
facts.impact: PAYMENT scope discrepancy — Zamtel checkout unavailable vs plan.

facts.fact: Payment webhooks idempotent with signature verification; replay-attack prevention; transaction ledger records all events.
facts.production_evidence: webhook_events table (0 rows); payments.lenco_reference UNIQUE; idempotency_key on checkout/ledger; CLAUDE.md idempotency convention. No live webhook rows to confirm runtime idempotency; ledger 0 txns (R2).
facts.gap: Idempotency/uniqueness designed; runtime idempotent handling and ledger recording unproven (0 rows); tied to R2.
facts.impact: Webhook safety unverified against live retries.

facts.fact: Checkout creates order atomically with stock decrement; multi-vendor order splitting (one order → vendor sub-orders); human-readable unique order number; stock reservation with timeout release.
facts.production_evidence: checkout_groups (customer_id, idempotency_key, totals) fan out to per-vendor orders; order_items(+products/services/tickets); stock_reservations (service-role); orders_checkout_group_vendor unique index. 0 orders (foundation).
facts.gap: Multi-vendor split schema present and matches intent; 0 orders so atomicity/reservation not runtime-proven.
facts.impact: Order fan-out designed; unexercised in prod.

facts.fact: Order state machine Placed→Confirmed→Processing→Shipped→Delivered→Completed with guarded transitions, cancellation+refund-by-state, and order event audit log.
facts.production_evidence: orders + order_events (audit trail) tables present (schema inventory); CLAUDE.md mandates guarded state-machine transitions with audit log. Exact status labels not dumped; 0 orders.
facts.gap: State-machine + audit pattern present; doc's exact state labels not verified against live CHECK enum; unexercised.
facts.impact: Lifecycle designed; label parity + runtime unproven.

facts.fact: Customer checkout UI: cart page, multi-step checkout, payment method selection (card, MTN, Airtel, Zamtel), DPO Pay redirect, USSD prompt flow, order tracking.
facts.production_evidence: Customer app live; checkout UI not audited (requires session/cart); payment provider is Lenco not DPO (F005); Zamtel collection disabled (F026).
facts.gap: Checkout UI behind app flow, not probed; provider/method mismatches inherited from F005/F026.
facts.impact: Customer payment UX parity unverified.

facts.fact: Reviews: rating 1-5, text, images, verified-purchase flag; only purchasers can review; vendor response; rating aggregation; moderation flags.
facts.production_evidence: reviews + review_aggregates tables (0 rows) via migration 0007_trust_ops; flags table (content moderation, 0 rows). CLAUDE.md: verified-purchase reviews only. (schema inventory)
facts.gap: Schema + verified-purchase policy present; 0 reviews; aggregation/moderation unexercised.
facts.impact: Trust/reviews designed; unused.

facts.fact: QR code generation per pickup order + scanning verification API to confirm delivery; scan triggers escrow release + order state update; camera-based vendor scanner UI.
facts.production_evidence: migration 0017_order_pickup_tokens present; 8 api refs to pickup/qr; escrow auto-release workflow NOT live (F025/R3). Events use dynamic-QR ticketing (separate).
facts.gap: Pickup-token/QR schema present; but escrow-release-on-scan depends on missing release workflow + missing ledger posting (F025). Scanner UI not audited.
facts.impact: QR pickup exists but the escrow-release side effect is broken (ties to P0 F025).

facts.fact: Admin panel with role-based access distinguishing SUPERADMIN and MODERATOR; role-based access enforced (moderator vs superadmin); non-admin users cannot access admin routes.
facts.production_evidence: Live user_roles.role CHECK = ('customer','vendor','admin') — single 'admin' role, no superadmin/moderator (repo 0002_identity_vendors.sql; 0 superadmin refs). Admin app is Cloudflare-Access gated + admin role. No admin CRUD UI for role management (R6).
facts.gap: Two-tier admin RBAC (superadmin/moderator) specified by doc is NOT implemented; production has a single admin role. Admin-role discrepancy.
facts.impact: IDENTITY/ADMIN-ROLE discrepancy — P0 until investigated. No moderator/superadmin separation of duties; role grants are manual (0051 role hook not applied).

facts.fact: Admin: vendor approve/reject/suspend, KYC review interface, product approval queue, user suspend/ban, admin activity audit log.
facts.production_evidence: apps/admin live (Access-gated); admin_* routers + admin_audit; audit_log table (RLS on, 0 policies, 0 rows). KYC 0 records; no user-role management UI (R6). (architecture, access inventory)
facts.gap: Admin app + audit table present; moderation flows not audited behind Access; audit_log empty; user/role management UI missing (R6).
facts.impact: Admin oversight partially realized; unproven.

facts.fact: Admin analytics: revenue/orders/active vendors/customers with date ranges; commission engine per-vendor & per-category; commission accurate to the ngwee; CSV/Excel export; payout tracking/reconciliation.
facts.production_evidence: commission_rates (9, bps); reconciliation_reports (0); payouts (0); analytics_events/funnel_events (0 rows); admin dashboard UI exists calling /admin/dashboard but streams empty (R4). Money in ngwee matches 'to the ngwee'.
facts.gap: Commission/reconciliation/payout schema present; analytics streams empty (0 rows) so dashboards blind (R4); CSV export not verified; per-category commission not confirmed.
facts.impact: Financial insight designed; unobservable without data/observability (R4).

facts.fact: Notification system: model (type/channel/recipient/content/read), email+SMS+in-app, per-channel preferences, translatable templates, real-time in-app (WebSocket/polling).
facts.production_evidence: notification_outbox table (RLS, 0 policies, 0 rows) drained by n8n dispatch workflow (VERIFIED active this session); adapters whatsapp/sms/email; outbox pattern (not Celery). In-app/WebSocket + preferences API not confirmed.
facts.gap: Outbox + dispatcher live; channel order is WhatsApp→SMS→email (not email-first); in-app/WebSocket + preference API + read-status not verified; Celery replaced by n8n (F008).
facts.impact: Transactional notifications wired; in-app + preferences unproven.

facts.fact: WhatsApp Business API (Meta Cloud API or BSP); approved templates; customer+vendor alerts; opt-in/opt-out; delivery-receipt webhook; fallback to SMS.
facts.production_evidence: WhatsApp Cloud API (official only; WAHA forbidden) adapter + webhook; SMS fallback via Africa's Talking; outbox dispatch active (CLAUDE.md, architecture, n8n VERIFIED). Template approval + opt-out flow not runtime-verified.
facts.gap: WhatsApp Cloud API path present + dispatch live (matches 'Meta Cloud API'); template approval status and opt-in/opt-out flow not verified; no live sends observed (outbox 0 rows).
facts.impact: Notification channel wired; delivery unproven.

facts.fact: Dispute model (reason/evidence/status/resolution); customer submit + vendor response + admin resolution; refunds full/partial/escrow-release; automatic escrow release after dispute window (~7 days post-delivery); refund logging & reconciliation.
facts.production_evidence: disputes + returns + refunds tables present but 0 rows (schema inventory). Refunds are ledger-orchestrated payouts (no Lenco refund API) per CLAUDE.md. Auto-release workflow + ledger posting missing (R2/R3).
facts.gap: Dispute/refund schema present; auto-escrow-release + refund ledger posting depend on missing workflow/ledger hook (F025). Dispute window value not confirmed. 0 rows.
facts.impact: Dispute/refund lifecycle designed but financially unwired (ties to P0 F025).

facts.fact: SEO: SSR/ISR, dynamic meta tags, XML sitemap, robots.txt, JSON-LD (Product/Organization/BreadcrumbList), canonical+hreflang, OG/Twitter, Search Console/Bing; Lighthouse SEO 95+.
facts.production_evidence: Customer app is SSR/ISR + SEO-focused (CLAUDE.md perf budgets: SEO ≥95); packages/ui has SEO components. Live sitemap/robots/JSON-LD not probed this session (egress).
facts.gap: SEO stack intended and components present; live meta/sitemap/Lighthouse not verified this session (NOT_AUDITABLE via HTTP).
facts.impact: SEO likely present; unverified live.

facts.fact: Performance: API p95 <200ms; homepage <2s on 3G; Lighthouse Perf 90+; cache hit >80%; WebP images; no N+1.
facts.production_evidence: CLAUDE.md CI-enforced budgets: ≤150KB gz JS, LCP ≤2.5s Fast-3G/360px, Lighthouse Perf ≥90. perf.yml exists but Lighthouse continue-on-error (advisory, R7). Cache-hit KPI N/A (no Redis, F007). Not measured this session.
facts.gap: Perf budgets exist (some stricter than doc) but Lighthouse gate is advisory; cache-hit metric inapplicable; live scores not measured.
facts.impact: Perf targets defined; enforcement partial (R7).

facts.fact: Security: OWASP Top 10 audit, rate limiting all endpoints, CSRF, XSS sanitization, SQLi parameterized audit, secure headers (HSTS/CSP/X-Frame), dependency scan (pip-audit/npm audit), no hardcoded secrets.
facts.production_evidence: CI has security-gates/deps-audit/secret-scan jobs but secret-scan is continue-on-error (non-blocking, R7); CSP present on customer HTML (foundation); RLS on all tables; Supabase advisor WARNs (definer funcs executable by anon, leaked-password protection off) (access inventory).
facts.gap: Security controls largely present but secret-scan non-blocking (R7) and open advisor WARNs (0050 revoke residual, leaked-password protection off); no penetration-test evidence.
facts.impact: SECURITY posture partial — non-blocking secret scan + advisor WARNs are review items.

facts.fact: n8n self-hosted (Railway or Docker) automations: vendor onboarding welcome sequence, order notifications, daily/weekly reports, abandoned-cart recovery (email+WhatsApp), review-request automation, webhook integration, error/alert workflows.
facts.production_evidence: n8n runs on OCI Docker (not Railway). Repo has 18 workflow JSONs (incl. abandoned-cart, review-request, kyc-nudge, admin-digest). LIVE: only 2 active (notification dispatch + payment reconciliation crons) — VERIFIED this session. Onboarding/abandoned-cart/review-request workflows NOT live.
facts.gap: n8n present + 2 workflows live, but most roadmap automations (onboarding sequence, abandoned cart, review request, digests) are authored-but-not-deployed; host is OCI not Railway (R3).
facts.impact: Lifecycle automation largely inactive in production (R3).

facts.fact: WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility; ARIA; focus management; usable at 320px; Lighthouse A11y 95+; cross-browser (Chrome/Firefox/Safari/Edge/Samsung Internet).
facts.production_evidence: CLAUDE.md budget: Lighthouse A11y ≥95, 360px-first. Live a11y score/cross-browser not measured this session.
facts.gap: A11y budget defined (≥95) matching doc; live audit not run this session.
facts.impact: A11y intended; unverified live.

facts.fact: Load testing with k6 or Locust: 100 concurrent users / 1000 req-min; p99 <500ms under load; DB connection-pool testing; all payment methods in sandbox.
facts.production_evidence: Repo has load/k6/* + load/invariant-check.py (ledger invariants) (architecture inventory). No live load-test run or sandbox payment evidence this session; payments 0 (R2).
facts.gap: Load/invariant tooling exists; no executed run or sandbox payment proof; p99 unverified.
facts.impact: Scale/payment-sandbox assurance unproven.

facts.fact: Full staging deployment (backend Railway, frontends Vercel) mirroring production; UAT with 3-5 testers; data migration scripts tested; monitoring (Sentry, UptimeRobot, logs); backup & recovery documented and tested.
facts.production_evidence: deploy-staging.yml is a STUB (architecture inventory); no Vergeo5 Sentry projects (R4); UptimeRobot not probed (NOT_AUDITABLE); backup workflow absent in n8n (R3, only backup-schedule.md doc). DR docs exist (runbook-disaster-recovery.md).
facts.gap: Staging pipeline is a stub; Sentry projects absent; backup workflow not deployed; UAT/monitoring launch prerequisites unmet.
facts.impact: Pre-launch staging + observability + backup gates unmet (R3/R4).

facts.fact: Production launch: Sentry error tracking configured; UptimeRobot monitoring on critical endpoints; log aggregation; monitoring alerts firing correctly; error tracking capturing/alerting.
facts.production_evidence: Sentry org convergeo-w2 has NO Vergeo5 projects (only zed*); code has no-op Sentry without DSN; UptimeRobot state NOT_AUDITABLE (R4).
facts.gap: No Vergeo5 Sentry projects/DSNs; monitoring launch criterion unmet; UptimeRobot unverified.
facts.impact: Production would launch blind to errors/money failures (R4).

facts.fact: Production DB with connection pooling (PgBouncer); DNS+SSL verified; SSL/TLS A+ on SSL Labs.
facts.production_evidence: Supabase provides Supavisor/PgBouncer pooling (not repo-managed); TLS via Cloudflare + Caddy live (HTTPS works per foundation). SSL Labs grade not probed this session (egress).
facts.gap: Pooling available via Supabase (not the PgBouncer-on-Railway topology in doc); SSL Labs A+ not verified this session.
facts.impact: Infra intent met differently; TLS grade unverified.

facts.fact: Launch requires 'production payment flow verified (small real transaction)'.
facts.production_evidence: payments = 0 rows, ledger_transactions = 0 (foundation). No real transaction has occurred; prepaid→ledger hook likely missing (R2).
facts.gap: No real payment verified; the doc's own launch gate is unmet, and the underlying ledger-posting path is unproven (R2).
facts.impact: PAYMENT launch gate unmet — money integrity blocker (R2).

facts.fact: Launch requires 'backup scheduled and first backup completed'.
facts.production_evidence: No backup workflow in live n8n (only backup-schedule.md contract); OCI dump host NOT_AUDITABLE (R3).
facts.gap: Backup workflow not deployed; first-backup completion unproven; RPO at risk.
facts.impact: Data-loss exposure; launch backup gate unmet (R3).

facts.fact: Launch state 'CONVERGEO IS LIVE' implies a real, production marketplace.
facts.production_evidence: Live catalogue is 3 demo vendors + 134 listings + 134 'demo/' Cloudinary images; 0 real orders/payments; public_launch flag = false (invite gate on) (R5, foundation).
facts.gap: Production presents DEMO/SEED inventory, not a real marketplace; public_launch=false. Not at the doc's 'LIVE' end-state.
facts.impact: Misleading marketplace if positioned as real; SEO/trust risk (R5).

facts.fact: Roadmap scope covers products commerce only (catalog, cart, checkout, orders, reviews, disputes).
facts.production_evidence: Production scope is broader: events/dynamic-QR ticketing, services/RFQ, supplies B2B tier pricing, directory, Ask Vergeo RAG, ZRA-ready invoicing — none mentioned in this roadmap (CLAUDE.md, schema inventory).
facts.gap: Document under-specifies the actual product surface; several live subsystems (events/services/supplies/directory/Ask/invoices) are out of the roadmap's scope.
facts.impact: Roadmap is not a complete spec of the platform; do not use it as the authoritative scope.
